title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 168.129 - Board member exempt from civil liability resulting from charges against teacher
text:
168.129.  Board member exempt from civil liability resulting from charges against teacher. — No member of a board of education or duly designated administrative officer of a board of education shall be liable in a civil action based on a statement of charges against a school teacher.
(L. 1969 p. 275 § 168.115)
